summary: Tested Members Module upgrade: pagination, search, archive/restore, activation status, and nationality flags. All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend UI elements verified for both admin and player roles. RBAC correctly restricts player access to archive/restore features.

tests: GET /api/members returns paginated list with default params (page=1, per_page=20)
Pagination controls visible in UI (Página 1 de 2)
Search with non-existent name returns empty list
Statistics include: total_events, attendance_rate, goals, assists
Archived member has is_archived=true and archived_team_ids stored
Archived button visible for admin in UI
Archived members dialog opens correctly in UI
Enviar Lembrete Ativação menu item visible for admin
Yellow dot (bg-yellow-500) shown for pending activation
Green dot (bg-green-500) shown for activated accounts
Indicators only visible for admin users
Nationalities limited to max 2 in API
Player cannot see Create Member button
Player cannot see Import Members button
Player cannot see activation status indicators

critical_code_review_comments: Members API correctly implements pagination with page, per_page, total, total_pages
Search is case-insensitive using MongoDB $regex with $options: 'i'
Archive preserves statistics and stores archived_team_ids for potential restore
RBAC correctly restricts archive/restore/reminder to admin only
Activation status indicator correctly shows green/yellow based on is_activated field
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_members_module.py - New test file for members module
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed members for archive/restore/reminder tests (auto-cleaned)

Admin-only features correctly restricted from players. Email API is MOCKED.
